ocr_findings.description: Callout box header: image reads 'コレが出る！' (part of '試験にはコレが出る！' styled badge). OCR renders this as '試験にはつしが出る！' — 'コレ' is misread as 'つし', which changes the meaning completely. The stylized/colored コレ text in the orange badge is misidentified.
Artifact '^{}[]' on line 5 of OCR output, from the Lesson 02-04 decorative badge/icon. Cosmetic noise, no text loss.
Diagram in image shows labeled nodes: '派遣元', '派遣先', '労働者', '指示', '雇用', '労働者派遣契約'. OCR image placeholder captures none of these diagram labels. Low severity as the diagram is supplementary.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 02-04 on labor/transaction laws. Main finding is the misread of the highlighted callout '試験にはコレが出る！' — 'コレ' rendered as 'つし', a medium-severity wrong_char in a prominent exam-tip box. The law explanations and prose body text are accurately captured. The '^{}[]' artifact is the same recurring Mistral pattern seen on other lesson-opening pages.
